name: exercise_query
description: Retrieve conditional exercises and progression precautions for a fracture phase.

name: pain_assess
description: Classify pain intensity and trajectory and return deterministic escalation fields.

name: progress_track
description: Compare reported function with phase milestones without making a diagnosis.

name: literature_search
description: Search the local evidence index and return source-grounded excerpts.

name: schedule_reminder
description: Create a local research reminder record; does not contact a patient.
